title: Minido Preschool Opens Enrollment for SY 2026-2027
summary: The DepEd-recognized institution in Boac is now accepting students for Nursery, Pre-Kinder, and Kinder classes.
content:
Early Childhood Education Starts Here

Minido Preschool officially announced the opening of enrollment for the upcoming school year 2026-2027. Located in Boac, the DepEd-recognized institution is accepting new students for Nursery (Age 3), Pre-Kinder (Age 4), and Kinder (Age 5).

Focus on Holistic Development

The school highlights a curriculum centered around play-based and structured learning. Parents can expect daily educational and creative activities designed to foster early cognitive and social skills. Classes are led by caring and qualified teachers within safe, child-friendly facilities.

Secure Your Child's Spot

Interested parents are encouraged to enroll their children early. For inquiries, families can reach out directly via their official Facebook page or contact them at 0917-850-4544.
key_takeaways: Minido Preschool is accepting students for Nursery (Age 3), Pre-Kinder (Age 4), and Kinder (Age 5).
The curriculum features play-based and structured learning.
Interested parents can contact 0917-850-4544 to secure a spot for SY 2026-2027.

faq.question: Where is Minido Preschool located?
faq.answer: The school is located at 14 Magsaysay St., Isok 1, Boac, Marinduque.

faq.question: What ages do they accept?
faq.answer: They accept children ages 3 to 5 for their Nursery, Pre-Kinder, and Kinder programs.

faq.question: How can I contact them for enrollment?
faq.answer: You can call or text 0917-850-4544 or message the Minido Preschool official Facebook page.
